sourceMovie.title: Adaptation.
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Adaptation. (2002) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The comedy and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Bottle Rocket
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Adaptation. clicked for you, Bottle Rocket (1996) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Adaptation.?
faq.answer: Try Bottle Rocket, Stranger Than Fiction, The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent—each shares DNA with Adaptation. while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Adaptation.?
faq.answer: Adaptation. (2002) is best described as Comedy, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Adaptation. worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
